ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) for the question */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date the question was answered */,
  "answer_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the question was answered */,
  "answering_body" TEXT /* Body that answered the question (e.g., Cabinet Office) */,
  "question_type" INTEGER /* Type of question (e.g., Topical, Substantive) */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location where the question was asked (e.g., House of Commons chamber) */,
  "question_status" INTEGER /* Status of the question (e.g., Tabled, Withdrawn, Answered) */,
  "ballot_number" INTEGER /* Ballot number for the question */,
  "date_tabled" TEXT /* Date the question was tabled */,
  "modified" TEXT /* Date and time the question was last modified */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "tabling_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member of parliament who tabled the question */,
  "uin" INTEGER /* Unique Identifier Number (UIN) for the question */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the question is related to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the question */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the question */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_question_type FOREIGN KEY ("question_type") REFERENCES question_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_question_status FOREIGN KEY ("question_status") REFERENCES question_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_tabling_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("tabling_member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member of parliament */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the member of parliament */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) for the member of parliament */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency represented by the member */,
  "printed_name" TEXT /* Printed name of the member of parliament */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party the member belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Office address of the member */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the member */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the member */,
  "facebook_profile" TEXT /* Facebook profile of the member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the question type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the question status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was provided */,
  "answer_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the answer was provided */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that provided the answer */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the answer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the answer was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the answer */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the answer was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the government department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the government department */,
  "minister_id" INTEGER /* ID of the minister in charge of the department */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_minister_id FOREIGN KEY ("minister_id") REFERENCES ministers ("minister_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constituency */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the constituency is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the constituency */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the constituency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the constituency's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the constituency's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot */,
  "ballot_number" INTEGER /* Ballot number */,
  "date_tabled" TEXT /* Date the ballot was tabled */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being voted on */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the ballot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ballot was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the ballot */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ballot was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ballot being voted on */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member of parliament casting the vote */,
  "vote_cast" TEXT /* Vote cast (e.g., Yes, No, Abstain) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was cast */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_ballot_id FOREIGN KEY ("ballot_id") REFERENCES ballots ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the party's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the party's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ministers" (
  "minister_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minister */,
  "minister_name" TEXT /* Name of the minister */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the minister */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the minister is in charge of */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the minister's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the minister's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minister_id")
)
